summary: Implemented a native OpenAI provider for `provider="openai"` so UnionLLM now calls the OpenAI SDK directly for chat by default and auto/selectively supports legacy completions for instruct models or `api_mode="completions"`. The new provider normalizes `api_base`/`base_url`, prefers call-time `api_key` over `OPENAI_API_KEY`, maps streaming usage and errors with `request_id`, and leaves the no-provider LiteLLM path untouched as a rollback path. Validation: `python -m pytest -q tests/test_openai_native.py` and `python -m pytest -q` both passed; the suite still has one existing skipped placeholder test in `tests/test_unionchat.py`. Remaining risk: completions compatibility currently converts message lists into a plain-text prompt transcript, so nuanced multi-turn/tool contexts on the legacy endpoint are intentionally best-effort.

validation.notes: Passed 7 focused tests covering native routing, chat/completions mapping, streaming usage, base_url/api_key override handling, and request_id-aware error mapping.
Full test suite passed; 1 existing placeholder parameterized test remains skipped in tests/test_unionchat.py.
Validated the saved result artifact against /private/var/www/prd/skills/prd-worker/assets/result.schema.json.
